title: Follow variable naming conventions
description: Local variables and function parameters should follow consistent naming conventions to improve code readability and maintainability. Inconsistent naming makes code harder to understand and increases the risk of errors during development.
recommendation: Use consistent, meaningful names that match established naming patterns for all variables and parameters.

noncompliant.description: Inconsistent, unclear, or non-standard variable naming makes code harder to read and maintain.

compliant.description: Following Go naming conventions with clear, descriptive names improves code readability and maintainability.
